generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam insulated container, heatbed, fan, DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply, designed to regulate internal temperature."
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, PowerSupply, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container for thermal insulation"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers to handle 4A current, actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO by the low-level driver"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO by the low-level driver"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for controlling heatbed and fan"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C, connected via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C, connected via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C, connected via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler, ScipyLibrary, RabbitMQBroker
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters, calibrated using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, PythonEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters, calibrated using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, PythonEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureMonitoringService, PredictiveThermalModelingService, ParameterCalibrationService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService, DigitalTwinDevelopmentService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language environment for running digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureMonitoringService, PredictiveThermalModelingService, ParameterCalibrationService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService, DigitalTwinDevelopmentService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinDevelopmentService
]

instance PCBDesignTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design tools for hardware design"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinDevelopmentService
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveThermalModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive thermal modeling using Model A and Model B for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration via non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterCalibrationAction
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control for temperature regulation using predefined lower and upper limits"
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for safety"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance DigitalTwinDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Development and maintenance of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersioningInsight, PCBDesignInsight
]

instance PredictedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature value from thermal models"
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current temperature reading from sensors"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in the thermal system for safety"
]

instance ParameterCalibrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calibration process updates model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control decision to turn on/off actuator based on temperature limits"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CodeVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control status of digital twin code"
]

instance PCBDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Design status of PCB components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the DT (e.g., heatbed activation/deactivation, fan control) are sent via RabbitMQ messages to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi, controller for control logic, low-level driver for hardware interaction, and simulation models; communication via RabbitMQ between PT and DT."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated through experimental temperature measurements; Model B better predicts thermal inertia; calibration minimizes residual error using Scipy; Assumption 1 (uniform temperature) tested via sensor data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for communication between PT and DT components hosted on Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver running on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver to prevent unsafe states; controller parameters (LL, UL) enforce temperature limits; MOSFETs and optocouplers isolate control signals from high-current components."
]
